# `.github/scripts`

There are **no active scripts** in this folder right now.

Previous **AWS ECS / ECR** helpers (`ecs-register-task-and-deploy.sh`, `run-ecs-migration-task.sh`) were moved to:

`deployment/archive/aws-ecs-dev-legacy/scripts/`

See **`docs/deployment/DEV-OPENCLOUD.md`** for the current DEV deploy (SSH + Docker on OpenCloud) and **`deployment/archive/aws-ecs-dev-legacy/README.md`** if you need to restore the ECS automation later.
